CloudFlared UI
Checking...

Tunnel Configuration

Manage your Cloudflare Tunnel connection

Paste your tunnel token. Find it at Zero Trust → Networks → Connectors → Cloudflare Tunnels → select your tunnel → Edit → copy from the install command.

Open Cloudflare One
Advanced Configuration

Custom identifier tag shown in the Cloudflare dashboard

Software name shown in the Cloudflare dashboard (restart cfui to apply)

Connection protocol to Cloudflare edge

Shutdown grace period (e.g., 30s)

Preferred connection region

Maximum connection retry attempts

Port for the metrics server

Local IP address to bind for outgoing connections to the Cloudflare edge (optional)

System Logs

Disconnected
System ready. Waiting for configuration...

Remote Tunnel Manager

Manage Cloudflare-hosted ingress rules independently from the local runner.

Disabled
Remote manager configuration

Your Cloudflare Account ID. Can also be set via CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID or CLOUDFLARE_APP_ID env vars.

Your tunnel's UUID. Changing this loads the tunnel configuration.

API Token is recommended. Blank secret fields keep the saved value.

?
Required Cloudflare API permissions Account · Argo Tunnel · Edit Zone · Zone · Read Zone · DNS · Edit Use account-scoped API Token when possible.

No token saved.

Create a scoped API token at Cloudflare Dashboard → My Profile → API Tokens.

Your Cloudflare account email address.

No key saved.

Find your Global API Key at Cloudflare Dashboard → My Profile → API Keys.

Public hostnames

Dynamic DNS

Automatically update DNS records when your public IP changes. Reuses Remote Manager API credentials.

Disabled

Configure API credentials first

Set up the Remote Tunnel Manager with your Cloudflare API token before using DDNS.

IPv4 —
IPv6 —
—
DDNS Settings

One URL per line. Each line is a separate source.

DDNS Records
Sync Log
No sync history yet.

MCP Access

Let AI clients operate cfui through the Model Context Protocol.

Disabled
Access tokens
Tokens are shown once when created. The list only shows masked values.

Connect an MCP client to the endpoint below and use a bearer token generated here.


                                
Available tools include status, config update, tunnel start/stop, recent logs, and remote tunnel ingress management.

                            

                        


                        

                            
                            
                        


                        

                            

                                

                                    
                                    
                                

                                

                                    
                                    
                                    
Paste your own token or leave blank to generate a strong one.

                                

                            

                            

                                
                            

                        


                        

                            

                                Copy this token now
                                
                            

                            
                        


                        

                            

                        

                    

                

            


            
            

                

                    

                        

                            
Features

                            
Enable optional feature tabs. Disabled features stay accessible from this page.

                        

                    

                    

                        

                            

                                
Remote Tunnel Manager

                                
Manage Cloudflare-hosted ingress rules via API.

                            

                            
                        

                        

                            

                                
DDNS

                                
Automatically update DNS records when your public IP changes. Requires Remote Manager.

                            

                            
                        

                        

                            

                                
MCP Access

                                
Let AI clients operate cfui through the Model Context Protocol.

                            

                            
                        

                    

                

            

        

    


    
    

        

            

                

                    
Add published application

                    
Create a public hostname route like the Cloudflare Zero Trust tunnel form.

                

                
            

            

                
                

                    
Public hostname

                    

                        

                            
                            
                        

                        

                            
                            

                                
                                
                            

                            
                            
Select a Cloudflare zone or type a domain manually.

                        

                    

                    

                        
                        
                        
Optional path matcher. Leave empty to publish the whole hostname.

                    

                


                

                    
Service

                    

                        

                            
                            
                        

                        

                            
                            
                            
Use host:port for HTTP/HTTPS/TCP/SSH/RDP, a socket path for UNIX, or a status code.

                        

                    

                


                

                    Additional application settings
                    

                        

                            

                                
                                
                            

                            

                                
                                
                            

                        

                        
                    

                

            

            

                
                
            

        

    


    
    

        

            

                

                    
Add DDNS record

                    
Create DNS records that follow the detected public IP.

                

                
            

            

                

                    

                        
                        
                    

                    

                        
                        
                    

                

                

                    

                        
                        
                        
                    

                    

                        
                        
                    

                

                

                    

                        
                        
                    

                    

                        
                        
                    

                

                
Use {IPV4} / {IPV6} for automatic detection, or enter a fixed public IP.
